serious delinquency.plain_english: You have accounts that are significantly past due or have been sent to collections

too many accounts with balances.plain_english: You are carrying balances on too many credit accounts

length of time accounts established.plain_english: Your credit history is too short — lenders want to see years of history

proportion of balances to credit limits.plain_english: Your credit card balances are too high compared to your limits (high utilization)

too few accounts paid as agreed.plain_english: Not enough of your accounts show consistent on-time payments

no recent revolving balances.plain_english: You have no recent credit card activity — lenders cannot assess current behavior
